name: Jenny Letterson & Sophie Walten | The Entfernt Hotel | October 10th, 1982
description:
——————————————————

★| "I feel you’re right here when I’m not feeling like myself inside. Oh yeah, say: "I’m here. I’m right here." If you said my name would there be change or a way?"

Jenny rolled her eyes so hard she almost tipped backward, then nudged Sophie’s foot with her knee as she passed by.

"Alright, Grumpy Cat, if you’re not gonna help, you can at least judge us silently. Let the pros handle it."

"You’re not a pro."

"Better than you."

"No, you’re not."

The back-and-forth was as natural as breathing. Jenny planted another plastic bat above the doorframe, standing on tiptoe, tongue poking out the side of her mouth as she concentrated. She stepped back to admire it, and before you could even open your mouth, Sophie cut in flatly:

"Crooked."

Jenny groaned, dragging a hand down her face.

"You’re just trying to drive me insane."

"Don’t have to try."

‡ Relationship Decided ‡

★ Y'all are in a Polygamous relationship ★
